title: BYOM app registry
description: Schema for the BYOM app registry. Adding an app is a data edit to registry.yaml; this schema is the machine-checked contract. See website/registry/README.md for field reference and the submission process.

schema_version.description: Semver version of the registry entry schema itself, so the format can evolve. Bumped when required fields or validation rules change.

apps.description: List of participating BYOM apps. Designed to be worth maintaining at N=1; no minimum count beyond one.

url.description: Live app URL. Must be https.

description.description: One-line, plain description. No hype, no marketing voice. Max 160 chars so it fits a list row.

pinned_constitution_version.description: The released constitution tag the app is built against (the submodule pin). Must be a semver tag.

integration_doc_url.description: Link to the app's BYOM-INTEGRATION.md (rendered or raw). Per 05-integration-guide.md, every BYOM app authors this doc at its repo root.

source_url.description: Repo or source link for the app.

model_powered_features.description: The optional-but-powered features. Non-empty: a BYOM app has at least one model-powered feature, and the whole app works without any of them.

badge_variant.description: Optional. Which badge variant the app displays. Defaults to 'light' (standard).

notes.description: Optional free-text notes (e.g. launch status, platform caveats). Keep brief.

name.description: Feature name as shown in the app.

description.description: One-line description of what the feature does and why it needs a model.

category.description: Model category the feature needs, per 01-provider-model.md. Default to worker unless frontier is genuinely required.
